case_title: HAL MUSKAT VS. ANGUS E. BEAN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPT., RETURNED "UNSUCCESSFUL/BAD ADDRESS-ADDRESS IS A RENTAL MAILBOX". FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUSKAT, HAL AS TO DEFENDANT BEAN, ANGUS E.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($35.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED APR-08-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHHOEURM, SUVANNA

DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF SUED A SHAREHOLDER AND EMPLOYEE OF THE CORPERATION RATHER THAN THE CORPERATION. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANT ANGUS E. BEAN WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MUSKAT, HAL AS TO DEFENDANT BEAN, ANGUS E. CHHOEURM, SUVANNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
